headline: Tyson Foods Plant Closures And New Accounting Chief Reshape Profit Outlook
summary: Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) is closing certain prepared foods and beef plants as part of a broad operational reshaping. The company is also appointing a new Chief Accounting Officer, signaling further leadership transition. These changes affect production capacity, workforce levels, and how the company organizes its business. Tyson Foods is a major player in meat and prepared foods, with a footprint that spans beef, pork, chicken, and ready to eat products. Plant closures in prepared foods and...
